mapper.sql: id, inspection_id, repairman_id, area_id, pipe_id, pipe_segment_id, task_name, type, priority, status, public_time, response_time, accomplish_time, feedback_information, create_time, update_time

sql.if: AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND t.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND t.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND t.area_id = #{areaId}) )

AND ( (MOD(#{request.areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND t.area_id BETWEEN #{request.areaId} AND #{request.areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{request.areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{request.areaId}, 100) = 0 AND t.area_id BETWEEN #{request.areaId} AND #{request.areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{request.areaId}, 100) != 0 AND t.area_id = #{request.areaId}) )

mapper.sql: t.id, COALESCE(NULLIF(t.task_name, ''), '未命名任务') as title, t.type, COALESCE(NULLIF(CONCAT_WS('', a.province, a.city, a.district), ''), '-') as area_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.name, ''), '-') as pipe_name, t.pipe_segment_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(ps.name, ''), '-') as pipe_segment_name, t.priority, t.status, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.name, ''), '-') as assignee, COALESCE(NULLIF(r.phone, ''), '-') as phone, t.public_time, t.response_time, t.accomplish_time, COALESCE(NULLIF(t.feedback_information, ''), '-') as feedback_information
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ( SELECT t.id, t.task_name, t.type, t.area_id, t.pipe_id, t.pipe_segment_id, t.priority, t.status, t.repairman_id, t.public_time, t.response_time, t.accomplish_time, t.feedback_information FROM task t
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) t LEFT JOIN repairman r ON t.repairman_id = r.id LEFT JOIN area a ON t.area_id = a.id LEFT JOIN pipe p ON t.pipe_id = p.id LEFT JOIN pipe_segment ps ON t.pipe_segment_id = ps.id

SELECT
FROM task t LEFT JOIN repairman r ON t.repairman_id = r.id LEFT JOIN area a ON t.area_id = a.id LEFT JOIN pipe p ON t.pipe_id = p.id LEFT JOIN pipe_segment ps ON t.pipe_segment_id = ps.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (inspection_id, repairman_id, area_id, pipe_id, pipe_segment_id, task_name, type, priority, status, public_time, response_time, accomplish_time, feedback_information, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{inspectionId}, #{repairmanId}, #{areaId}, #{pipeId}, #{pipeSegmentId}, #{taskName}, #{type}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{publicTime}, #{responseTime}, #{accomplishTime}, #{feedbackInformation}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = 1
AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND area_id = #{areaId}) )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = 1 AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE create_time >= CURDATE() AND create_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = 2
AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND area_id = #{areaId}) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task
WHERE ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND area_id = #{areaId}) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = 0
AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND area_id = #{areaId}) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE priority = 1
AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND area_id = #{areaId}) )
